summary: Supersede 01KNFRR0N307V275WCZF7YTPVE (npm list workaround): reverted in commit 69818b8 after twining-mcp v1.16.0 added proper --version support. captureEnvironment() now uses 'twining-mcp --version' with 5s timeout, not the npm list fallback.
context: Twining housekeeping verification: 2 of 3 stale provisionals confirmed in code, 1 is obsolete (reverted in commit 69818b8)
